creator: igor@hybrid-lab.co.uk
text:
(In reply to Kaho Toshikazu from comment #15)

Ah, I see! I thought it was bus_alloc_resource_any(...) that was writing to memrid on allocation, why else would it need a pointer to a non-const int, right?! ;-) Thanks for clearing it up.

We're good to go, the patch that changes rid passed to bus_release_resource(...) does the trick.
